name: io.github.dbe006/rugguard-mcp
title: RugGuard
description: Pre-trade rug-check API for AI agents. 14 deterministic heuristics on Base + 5 on Solana SPL, returns a weighted risk score 0-100, a verdict, and structured red flags. Settled in USDC via x402 — $0.01 per scan, no API key. Free `rugguard://metrics` resource exposes live per-heuristic empirical recall so an agent can audit the methodology before paying. Holds a dedicated EOA wallet locally with built-in spend caps (default $5/session, $10/24h), asset whitelist (USDC-on-Base only), and 10-second EIP-3009 replay window.
